headline: Fake News Prosecutions Under Section 233 Hit 480 Cases
context: MCMC prosecuted 480 individuals under Section 233 CMA for allegedly spreading false information in 2025.

cards.big: 480 prosecuted for fake news under Section 233 in 2025 a record
cards.sub: Prosecutions target social media users journalists and opposition politicians

cards.big: 38% of prosecutions involved criticism of government policies or leaders
cards.sub: Opposition says law is weaponized to silence legitimate political speech

cards.big: Conviction rate of 72% with average fine RM18,000 or 3 months jail
cards.sub: Most defendants are individuals not organized disinformation networks

cards.big: Only 8 of 480 prosecutions targeted organized commercial disinformation
cards.sub: Resources focus on individual posts rather than systematic fake news factories

cards.big: Prosecution patterns test whether fake news laws target disinformation or dissent
480 fake news prosecutions under Section 233. Vague laws produce selective enforcement and self-censorship.
